text.title: Change Control Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree on observables (baseline_frozen, value_band_USD, compliance_required) to apply / fall-back / skip. Each leaf references a rule id from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Project has a frozen scope/cost/schedule baseline?

conclusion.verdict: apply lightweight CR log; PM tier-1 only
rolling-baseline agile project — change-control replaced by backlog refinement

text.example: baseline_frozen=true → project_value_band=medium → apply full tiered change-control (rule cr-log-immutable).
